main.description: Bidirectional attestation binding this repo's DID to an embedded wallet. The record lives in the user's repo (repo commit = DID vouches for wallet); walletSig is the wallet key's signature over the canonical binding message (wallet vouches for DID). Verifiers MUST check both directions.

service.description: Optional DID of the wallet service holding the server share (e.g. did:web:wallet.example.com), for discovery.

signatureHex.description:
secp256k1 signature (r||s hex, with recovery id appended as one byte) by the EVM wallet key over the EIP-191 digest of the canonical binding message 'atproto-wallet-binding:v1
<did>
<evmAddress>
<solAddress>'.
Optional ed25519 signature by the Solana wallet key over the UTF-8 canonical binding message.
